data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of embedded calendar invites, but there is no evidence provided that confirms their implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for embedded calendar invites, yet the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or state checks that demonstrate this requirement is met. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction regarding the presence of .ics files.
gaps: No evidence of embedded calendar invites (.ics files) being implemented or available.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify embedded calendar invites functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if .ics files are generated and returned for bookings.
